MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID BRILLIANT FOR PLAINTIFF VINCENT KIRCHER
DEFENDANT WILLIAM HENRY IN PRO PER

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. BOTH PARTIES WERE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT WERE READ AS FOLLOWS: THIS IS A STAY AND PAY SETTLEMENT. DEFENDANT TO RESUME PAYING RENT OF $160.00 PER WEEK ON DECEMBER 22, 2004. DEFENDANT OWES PLAINTIFF THE SUM OF $1725.54 ($640.00 BACK RENT, $777.24 RENT FROM NOV. 13 - DEC.16, 2004, $160.00 RENT FROM DEC.18 - DEC. 24, 2004, $148.30 COSTS OF SUIT) PAYMENT IS DUE EVERY SATURDAY OF EACH WEEK. THERE IS A $15.00 INCREMENT WITH THE RENT UNTIL BALANCE IS PAID. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY, PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK AN EX PARTE JUDGMENT. WRIT OF POSSESION TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY.

JTP PETER HADIARIS, CLERK CLARK BANAYAD, REPORTER JOANN BRYCE (218)

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
